'''Bryan Andrews''' was a writer and created the storyboards for the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated series.<ref name="CW1">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> His brother is [[Mark Andrews]].
